com.mentor.chs.api.icd

Interface IXICD

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXObject

    public interface IXICD
extends IXObject
    Interface representing an ICD.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXUser getAssignedUser()
      Get the user that this ICD is assigned to.
      IXLibraryDevice getLibraryDevice()
      Get the library device associated with this ICD.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXICDPin> getPinSignalAssociations()
      Get the pin signal associations of this ICD.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXICDTag> getTags()
      Get the applicability tags (see IXICDTag) of this ICD.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject

        getAttribute, getAttributes, getBaseID, getID, getParentID, getProperties, getProperty, getSymbol, toHTML, toHTML

    • Method Detail

      • getLibraryDevice

        IXLibraryDevice getLibraryDevice()
        Get the library device associated with this ICD.
        Returns:
        IXLibraryDevice, the library device if exists, null otherwise.

      • getTags

        java.util.Set<? extends IXICDTag> getTags()
        Get the applicability tags (see IXICDTag) of this ICD.
        Returns:
        Set<IXICDTag>, the tags if exist, an empty list otherwise.

      • getPinSignalAssociations

        java.util.Set<? extends IXICDPin> getPinSignalAssociations()
        Get the pin signal associations of this ICD.
        Returns:
        Set<IXICDPin>, the list of pin signal associations if any, empty list otherwise.

      • getAssignedUser

        IXUser getAssignedUser()
        Get the user that this ICD is assigned to.
        Returns:
        IXUser, the user that this ICD is assigned, null if the ICD is not assigned to any user
